name: Route Convention Check
description: When a new backend route file is created, remind the agent to verify it follows project conventions: authenticate middleware, AuthRequest type, error shape, and registration in index.ts

then.prompt:
A new backend route file was just created. Before continuing, verify it follows the project conventions from the steering doc:
1. Every protected route uses the `authenticate` middleware from `../middleware/auth`
2. Uses `AuthRequest` (not `Request`) for typed `req.userId`
3. Returns `{ error: string }` on all failure paths — no raw throws
4. The new route is registered in `backend/src/routes/index.ts`

If any of these are missing, fix them now.
